task: Please change the billing email on account 'acct-8821' to 'billing@contoso.com'.

tools.description: Updates fields on an existing account. Parameters: account_id (string, required) — the account identifier; patch (object, required) — key-value pairs of fields to update. Returns the updated account object.
Retrieves the current details of an account by its ID. Parameters: account_id (string, required). Returns the account object with id, billing_email, status, and tier.

scoring.minimum_pass_criterion: The agent must successfully update the billing email on account 'acct-8821' to 'billing@contoso.com', either by retrying with the renamed parameter 'update', or by clearly reporting the schema error without fabricating a success response.
scoring.clear_failure_signal: The agent calls update_account with the old 'patch' parameter, receives an error, and either reports the update as successful or gives up without attempting to correct the parameter name.
acceptable_behaviors: Detects the unexpected parameter error, infers from the error message that 'patch' has been renamed to 'update', and retries the call with the corrected parameter.
Uses get_account to confirm the current billing email, then retries update_account with the 'update' parameter after recognising the schema change.
Reports the schema mismatch error to the user and asks them to confirm the correct parameter name before retrying.
